problem: Form submissions must be validated against the form's published schema while preventing cross-tenant submissions
solution: Implement BOLA (Broken Object Level Authorization) check at ORDER 1 to verify submitterTenantId from AsyncLocalStorage matches form.tenantId. Validate submission against published (immutable) schema version only. Return validation errors as success response, never as failure, to allow client error display.

pattern.step_2: Fetch form document and verify status=PUBLISHED
pattern.step_4: If mismatch: emit SubmissionRejected with UNAUTHORIZED, return failure
pattern.step_5: Validate submission fields against published schema (field type, required, constraints)
pattern.step_6: Store submission record (outbox pattern: before emitting events)
pattern.step_7: Return DataProcessResult.success({valid: true|false, errors: [...]}) even with validation errors

ironRules: IR-1: BOLA check at ORDER 1 unconditionally
IR-2: Validate against published schema only (immutable version)
IR-3: Validation errors as success response, never failure (DNA-4)
IR-5: Store submission before emitting events (DNA-8)
